title: Security incidents that marked Trump’s rise
shortDescription: Trump has faced multiple assassination attempts, security incidents and violent threats throughout his political career, most recently in Washington.

title: Trump says King Charles visit will go ahead
shortDescription: In an interview on Fox News on Sunday morning, President Trump said an upcoming state visit with King Charles III would continue as planned.

title: Trump says shooting proves need for WH ballroom
shortDescription: President Trump said the attack on the White House Correspondents' Dinner underlines the need for his embattled ballroom addition to the White House.

title: Key GOP senator says he'll support Trump's Fed chair pick
shortDescription: Sen. Thom Tillis hailed the Trump administration's decision to end its probe of Fed Chair Powell, easing the way for Kevin Warsh to take the helm.

title: Video shows Trump, Vance rushed off at dinner
shortDescription: Eyewitness video showed President Trump, Vice President JD Vance and cabinet members being rushed out of the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

title: It is first lady Melania Trump's birthday. What has she done this year?
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump was once often out of the public eye as first lady. But this year she has made news repeatedly with her movie and more.

title: Suspected gunman 'likely' targeted Trump, official says: DC shooting updates
shortDescription: The suspect who officials say opened fire at the White House correspondents' dinner will be arraigned Monday on multiple charges, officials said.

title: Tuxedos, satin gowns and a surreal White House briefing after shooting
shortDescription: The president and reporters were dressed up for a party at the Washington Hilton. They ended up at the White House for a briefing on another shooting.

title: Polls show Democrats ahead before midterms. Could Georgia turn blue?
shortDescription: Democrats have been over performing in special elections in Georgia and are bringing momentum into the midterm elections. Could Georgia go blue?

title: Gunpowder in the air: A fancy press dinner with Trump, then shots fired
shortDescription: The intrigue before the White House Correspondents' Dinner had been about Trump-press tensions. Gunshots cut the evening short.

title: What we know about security after the White House press dinner shooting
shortDescription: How did a suspected shooter get so close to the black-tie gala? A former Secret Service leader describes what it takes to protect the annual event.

title: Trump calls presidency a dangerous profession
shortDescription: Donald Trump says being president is a dangerous profession after a shooting at the White House press dinner.

title: What we know about White House press dinner shooter
shortDescription: Multiple media outlets are reporting that Cole Tomas Allen is in custody for the shooting at the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

title: Trump calls shooting suspect a 'whack job'
shortDescription: President Trump referred to the alleged White House Correspondents' Dinner shooter as a "lone wolf" and a "whack job."

title: How often has Trump faced assassination attempts? A timeline
shortDescription: Donald Trump has faced multiple assassination attempts and security threats during his political career, including a confirmed shooting.

title: Trump commends officer shot at press dinner
shortDescription: President Trump spoke after the shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. He said one officer was shot but was saved by a bulletproof vest.

title: Texas leaders react after evacuation at White House press dinner
shortDescription: Texas leaders react as President Trump and other officials evacuated due to a D.C. shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner.

title: Zachary Levi at White House Correspondents' dinner when shots fired
shortDescription: Actor Zachary Levi was among the guests at the Washington Hilton Hotel when shots were fired during the White House Correspondents' dinner.

title: Reporter gives White House press dinner updates
shortDescription: USA TODAY correspondent Ralphie Aversa gave an update on the White House press dinner after Trump was evacuated.

title: Trump, first lady evacuated from dinner. See the moment it happened
shortDescription: President Trump and first lady Melania Trump are evacuated from the White House Correspondents' dinner by Secret Service.
